ogTitle: Ramsgate Beach vs Rand: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ramsgate Beach and Rand.
heading: Ramsgate Beach vs Rand — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ramsgate Beach, New South Wales and Rand, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rand has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Ramsgate Beach (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ramsgate Beach or Rand safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ramsgate Beach has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Rand scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ramsgate Beach scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Rand scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ramsgate Beach or Rand?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rand has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
